headline: Jordan Henderson
body: Jordan Henderson expected to miss remainder of World Cup with suspected broken arm. Due to undergo surgery. Midfielder keen to stay with squad for the rest of the tournament. bbc.co.uk/sport/football/art… Link World Cup 2026: England midfielder Jordan Henderson expected to have surgery on injured wrist Jordan Henderson is expected to have surgery on the wrist injury he sustained while celebrating England's win over Mexico on Monday. bbc.co.uk

World Cup 2026: England midfielder Jordan Henderson expected to have surgery on injured wrist

Jordan Henderson is expected to have surgery on the wrist injury he sustained while celebrating England's win over Mexico on Monday.
